title: DHAS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 10 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Dr. Hedgewar Arogya Sansthan (DHAS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 10 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, or DNB can apply for the DHAS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
